category_sources: source_facts.description: Dynamic menu for X11; source_facts.homepage is the official suckless dmenu page.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives dmenu; current_curation.display-name gives dmenu.
docs_sources: Official suckless dmenu page is the primary documentation surface and links development/download information.
repo_sources: Official suckless dmenu page says the source repository can be browsed/cloned at git.suckless.org/dmenu.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an X11 dynamic menu; source_facts.executables lists command-line tools dmenu, dmenu_run, dmenu_path, and stest.
